overall.description: A static first-person view from inside a cyberpunk apartment bedroom looking out a large window at a futuristic cityscape with flying vehicles passing by. The scene features high-quality game engine graphics with dramatic natural lighting and a cool blue color palette typical of the cyberpunk aesthetic.

segments.scene_description: A perfectly static view from a cyberpunk apartment bedroom shows an unmade bed in the foreground and a sweeping city view through a large window. The futuristic skyline features towering glass structures under a partly cloudy morning sky, while flying vehicles occasionally cruise past the window, emphasizing the high-tech setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective from within a cyberpunk bedroom, focusing on the contrast between a lived-in interior and a sprawling futuristic metropolis. It begins with a view of an unmade bed in the immediate foreground, framing a massive window that looks out over the city. As the gaze lingers on the horizon, the scene reveals a skyline of towering glass structures set against a partly cloudy morning sky. The composition remains steady as flying vehicles cruise past the window, further integrating the quiet domestic space with the high-tech activity of the urban environment.
